context: section-3 acceptance lists three preset numeric specifications (Friendly Turbo: 1500 stack/7min levels/15s clock/10-20 L1 blinds; Standard Home Game: 10000/20min/30s/50-100; WSOP-Style Deep Stack: 60000/30min/45s/100-200/BBA 200). The Researcher findings (probe-001) supply these values; section-3 implementation in src/tournament/presets.js encodes them as the canonical TOURNAMENT_PRESETS array.
what_was_done: Single builder produced both presets.js AND the settings UI form; no decomposition into two builders was useful at this scale.
rationale: presets.js is a static data file (Researcher findings transcribed); the settings UI form reads it. Splitting into two builders would create artificial coordination overhead. Same logical outcome.
nested_equivalent: Under nested dispatch, section-3's Overseer might have dispatched two builders (one for presets data, one for settings form); the integration would produce the same files. Skipping decomposition is a Builder-discretion choice.
